description: An operations manager is setting up the access levels for different types of credentials for an upcoming festival (e.g., staff, artist, press).

nodes.task_description: Define the different access zones in the venue (e.g., backstage, production office, stage, general admission).

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a list of all access zones.

nodes.task_description: Create different credential profiles (e.g., 'All Access', 'Stage Crew', 'Press').

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the required profiles in the access control system.

nodes.task_description: Assign specific zone access rights to each credential profile.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly configures the system so that, for example, the 'Press' profile does not have access to the 'Backstage' zone.
